claim_boundary: Noncanonical software diagnostic: operational self-evaluation/reliability monitoring over frozen v2.0; not consciousness, self-awareness, hardware evidence, AGI, or a v2.1 freeze.

criteria.name: non-oracle monitors do not use outcomes
monitor values are computed before feedback
candidate confidence is calibrated by Brier score
candidate confidence calibration error is bounded
candidate improves behavior vs v2.0 no-monitor
monitor must be behaviorally used, not just reported

failure_reason: Failed criteria: candidate confidence calibration error is bounded, candidate avoids bad primary-path actions

summary.claim_boundary: Noncanonical software diagnostic: operational self-evaluation/reliability monitoring over frozen v2.0; not consciousness, self-awareness, hardware evidence, AGI, or a v2.1 freeze.
